lines.lyric: When I pressed play on the time machine (which was actually a British phone booth painted green, don't ask), my only intention was to grab some cool rocks and see a dinosaur before dinner.
lines.real_meaning: The naive, trivial expectations we had before technology changed everything — like buying the first smartphone 'just to make calls'.
media_queries: vintage green British phone booth glowing in fog, mysterious cinematic lighting, time travel portal
A steaming cup of tea sits on an old, wooden table in a green booth. The door is ajar and mist slowly rolls inside.
Faded newspaper clippings swirl as they catch fire in the phonebooth, forming a vortex.

lines.lyric: I landed in a valley of moss and smoke. Smell of rain, fire in the air. And there he was: the first human I'd ever seen. Crouched by a pile of stones, blowing on a twig like his life depended on it. And it did.
lines.real_meaning: Humanity in its raw state — before technology, before dogma. Survival was simple, honest, and desperately hard.
media_queries: prehistoric misty valley with a lone figure crouched by dying embers, smoke rising, cinematic wide shot
A close-up of hands expertly crafting a stone tool against a backdrop of fiery embers.
Ethereal rays of sunlight breaking through fog to illuminate the figure from above.

lines.lyric: Let's call him Gralha.
lines.real_meaning: Naming the archetype: the first naive consumer, the first believer, the first follower.
media_queries: close-up of a primitive man's face lit by firelight, eyes wide with curiosity, dramatic portrait
Primitive hands reach out to warm flames.
Warm tones of firelight dance on rugged rockface.

lines.lyric: Gralha held the orange box, turned it in his hand
lines.real_meaning: The first human holding a smartphone — turning it over, mesmerized by something they can't understand.
media_queries: primitive man holding a glowing orange object in both hands, reverent awe, cinematic firelight
Man's face aglow in wonder as he gazes upon the alien device.
Glowing orange object suspended in the darkness, rays of light emanating from it.

lines.lyric: "Mage," he said, "explain to me, help me understand
lines.real_meaning: The consumer asking the tech guru to explain how it works — already surrendering authority to the 'expert'.
media_queries: two figures in a dark cave, one kneeling before the other, seeking knowledge, dramatic shadows
A hand reaches out to touch a glowing artifact in an ancient stone cave.
Warm hues of light and shadow interplay on a face seeking enlightenment.

lines.lyric: Where does fire sleep at night? Where does it go to rest?
lines.real_meaning: Where does the Wi-Fi come from? How does the cloud work? Questions we never truly answer, just accept.
media_queries: ethereal sleeping flame curled up inside a translucent box, dreamlike surreal art, warm glow
Glowing tendrils of flame gently unfurl from their box.
A vast, glowing cloud with delicate flames dancing through it.

lines.lyric: Show me its cradle, show me its nest."
lines.real_meaning: Show me the server farm, show me the algorithm — the desperate need to locate the magic somewhere physical.
media_queries: vast glowing data center reflected in a primitive man's eyes, juxtaposition of ancient and modern

A vast starfield emerges from an ancient cave painting as constellations form algorithms.

lines.lyric: THE ORANGE BOX! THE ORANGE BOX!

lines.lyric: The baby fire sleeps inside!

The shell's warm glow dissipates into a void of cold, vast and empty, leaving only ash.

lines.lyric: THE ORANGE BOX! THE ORANGE BOX!

a fiery embers swirl within,  an audience member's eyes wide with wonder and confusion

media_queries: confused man whispering while looking at a simple stone, unable to see its value, intimate cinematic

A distant view of the man standing small beneath a vast, stormy sky.

lines.lyric: The women cheered, the men looked scared
lines.real_meaning: Liberation terrifies those who built their identity on the old system — freedom is threatening to the invested.
media_queries: split scene of joy and fear, some celebrating while others recoil, emotional contrast, cinematic
A lone, crumpled, faded hat on the cobblestones, surrounded by cheering women's shadows.
Broken chains draped over a weathered stone wall, glistening in the warm sunlight.

lines.lyric: The first belief was declared
lines.real_meaning: But even liberation becomes dogma — Muda's truth is already being turned into the next ideology.
media_queries: crowd beginning to form around a new symbol, the cycle starting again, bittersweet cinematic
A lone hand reaches out to touch the symbol, fingers tracing its edges in a golden sunset.
Warm hues swirling, a figure releases a dove from their hands into a misty sunset sky

lines.lyric: Tchak... tchak... tchak...
lines.real_meaning: The sound persists — truth doesn't need followers, it just keeps working. Stone on stone, always available.
media_queries: stones striking in rhythm, sparks in darkness, persistent simple truth, meditative cinematic
A close-up of sparks glinting against rough stone surfaces, ignited by rhythmic strikes of a hammer.
Flickering embers descend through a dark and warm-toned space, representing truth's enduring nature.

lines.lyric: "The fire was always ours."
lines.real_meaning: The core message of the entire album — the power was never in the tool, it was always in us.
media_queries: hands cupped around a self-made flame, intimate warmth, human power, emotional close-up cinematic
A single ember floating away from the fire against a dark background, with warm tones and painterly strokes.
An abstract representation of a flame transforming into a heart in rich reds and oranges, glowing with cinematic lighting.

lines.lyric: The Mage said box! The box is law!
lines.real_meaning: The traditionalist's cry — 'the founder said so', 'it's in the constitution', appeal to authority over evidence.
media_queries: angry figure pointing at an orange box and shouting to a crowd, dogmatic authority, dramatic cinematic
A close-up of the orange box, its surface weathered, reflecting harsh sunlight, a single tear rolling down its side.
An aerial view of the crowd, their shadows stretching long and distorted, the stage empty amidst a sea of disarray.

lines.lyric: The box is everything we saw!
lines.real_meaning: Confirmation bias as faith — 'I saw it work, therefore the whole system is true.'
media_queries: crowd pressing forward with fierce conviction, pointing at a glowing object, mob certainty, cinematic
A gloved hand grasping a glowing object against a blur of eager faces.
The gleam from the glowing box spreads across faces, casting a warm, unifying glow on a sea of hopeful eyes.

lines.lyric: Muda's wrong, she breaks the rules!
lines.real_meaning: The heretic label — anyone who questions the system is dangerous, must be cancelled, silenced, burned.
media_queries: crowd pointing accusingly at a lone woman, witch trial energy, dramatic shadows cinematic
Tattered rope binding her wrists, defiant eyes meet accusers.
Flickering candlelight dances on weathered faces, fear and anger intertwined.

lines.lyric: We are the faithful, we are the tools!
lines.real_meaning: Proud submission — wearing servitude as identity, 'I'm a company man', the tools calling themselves faithful.
media_queries: row of identical figures saluting with tools in hand, proud servitude, dystopian cinematic
Glowing tool head glinting in harsh light, fingers wrapped around grip tightly
Shattered reflection of a face, pride and pain intertwined

lines.lyric: Look at the stone! Look at your hand!
lines.real_meaning: Muda's counter — empirical evidence, your own experience, trust your senses over their narrative.
media_queries: open hands holding a rough stone, sunlight revealing its potential, empowering close-up cinematic

Warm light shatters on the stone as it's gently turned to reveal its inner beauty

lines.lyric: The fire rises when you understand!
lines.real_meaning: Knowledge is the real power — not belief, not brand loyalty, not tribal membership. Understanding.
media_queries: fire rising from struck stones illuminating a face of understanding, eureka moment, warm cinematic

Warm hues of ember and flame blend into a face glowing with enlightenment

lines.lyric: The Mage is just a guy with tricks!

lines.lyric: The spark is yours, it's in the sticks!

A golden field of wheat with grain swaying in wind, rippling like waves under sun.

lines.lyric: TWO FIRES! TWO FIRES!

lines.lyric: Burning in the same night!

Two hands reach across the void, fingers almost touching, as the flames flicker between them.

lines.lyric: TWO FIRES! TWO FIRES!

lines.lyric: GRAL-HA! GRAL-HA!

lines.lyric: He's got the box, she's got the spark

lines.lyric: "Revolution... I'll call you Revolution."
